name: Crab and Spinach Quiche
recipeIngredient: 6 to 8 Ounces Crabmeat, Thawed, Drained, Flaked (canned or)
recipeInstructions:
10 Ounce Pkg. Frozen Chopped Spinach -- thawed/well drained
Pastry For Double Crust Pie -- (9 inch)
1. In a large bowl, lightly beat the eggs.
2. Add milk, salt, pepper, and nutmeg to the beaten eggs; stir until combined.
3. Combine the cheese and flour in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the cheese-flour mixture to the egg mixture with the crab and spinach.
5. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
6. Pour the filling into two pastry-lined pie plates or quiche pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
8. Cut into narrow pieces and serve warm.
Yield: 32-36 servings.
